response.original_title: 水谷ケイさんといく酒と温泉ふたり旅
response.overview: Actress Kei Mizutani takes you on a visit to Tateyama Onsen. With fresh cuisine and hot springs offering stunning views, the two of you are in for a wonderful time. From traditional Japanese-style restaurants and foot baths to roadside stations and zoos, there’s plenty to enjoy beyond the hot springs themselves. On this trip, actress Kei Mizutani has you all to herself. The destination is Tateyama Shiomi Onsen, a wonderful spot with a romantic, hideaway-like atmosphere. The two of you will explore stylish cafés and sushi restaurants, as well as Shiroyama Park and Tateyama Castle.
response.title: Kei Mizutani Enjoys a Nice Time Drinking and Bathing in an Onsen with You
